footer.brandDescription: India's smart bus booking platform. Compare operators, pick your seat, and travel with real-time GPS tracking and instant e-tickets.
footer.downloadDescription: Book tickets, track buses live, and manage your trips — all from your pocket. Download the BookMySeat app today.

offers.offerDescription: Save big on every journey with our latest promo codes and discounts.

services.servicesDescription: Everything you need for a smooth and affordable bus journey — all in one place.
services.bookBusTicketsDesc: Search from 650,000+ routes, compare operators, pick your seat, and book in seconds with instant e-tickets.
services.liveBusTrackingDesc: Track your bus in real-time on the map with GPS. Share live location with family and get accurate ETAs.
services.rentABusDesc: Planning a group trip? Rent AC and non-AC buses for weddings, pilgrimages, corporate events, and more.
services.groupBookingsDesc: Book for 10+ passengers at once and enjoy special group discounts, priority boarding, and dedicated support.

whyChooseUs.whyChooseDescription: Experience the next generation of bus travel with real-time tracking, verified operators, and a seamless booking experience.
whyChooseUs.fastestBookingDesc: Book your seat in under 60 seconds with our lightning-fast search and checkout.
whyChooseUs.safeAndSecureDesc: PCI-DSS compliant payments with SSL encryption. Your data is always protected.
whyChooseUs.easyRefundsDesc: Hassle-free cancellations with instant refunds — no questions asked policy.
whyChooseUs.support247Desc: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock via phone, email, or chat.
whyChooseUs.liveGPSTrackingDesc: Track your bus on a live map with real-time location updates and accurate ETAs.
whyChooseUs.verifiedOperatorsDesc: Every partner is vetted for safety, punctuality, and service quality standards.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to the most common questions about BookMySeat.
faq.q1: How do I book a bus ticket on BookMySeat?
faq.a1: Simply enter your origin, destination, and travel date in the search bar on the home page. Browse available buses, select your preferred seat, fill in passenger details, and complete the payment. You'll receive an instant e-ticket on your phone.
faq.q2: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
faq.a2: Yes! Navigate to "My Bookings" and click "Cancel" on the relevant booking. Cancellations made 24+ hours before departure receive a 90% refund. Rescheduling is available for select routes — check the booking details for eligibility.
faq.q3: How does live bus tracking work?
faq.a3: Go to the "Track Bus" page and enter your bus name or number. If the bus has GPS tracking enabled, you'll see its real-time location on the map with estimated arrival times at upcoming stops.
faq.a4: We accept UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay), net banking, and popular digital wallets. All transactions are secured with industry-standard encryption.
faq.q5: Are there any discounts for first-time users?
faq.a5: Absolutely! First-time users get up to 15% off on their first booking with code BMSFIRST. We also have regular seasonal offers, cashback deals, and referral bonuses. Check the Offers page for current promotions.
faq.q6: Is BookMySeat available in my city?
faq.a6: BookMySeat covers 650,000+ routes across India, connecting 6,200+ bus operators in major cities and towns. Whether it's a metro city or a small town, chances are we have a route for you. Search your route to check availability.
